packageRules.description: Group all GitHub Actions bumps into one PR.
Group the Python runtime + dev requirements (base / gpu / convert / dev) into one PR.

NVIDIA CUDA wheels: never cross the pinned major. main.py's Windows DLL preloader hardcodes cublas64_12 / cudnn64_9, so a major bump (cublas 13.x, cudnn 10.x) would silently break GPU inference. The <13 / <10 caps in requirements-gpu.txt already block this; this makes the intent explicit.
Major bumps require manual review — surface as checkboxes on the Dependency Dashboard, do not open the PR automatically, do not auto-merge. Minor/patch still flow through automerge gated by all-ci.
